name: ACTIVATE_PHYSICS
lua:
-- 0x710311ADF0E20730 · build 1207
local entity = 0
ActivatePhysics(entity)

name: ADD_ROPE
comment:
There are 19 types of rope, from type = 0 to type = 18
Rope definitions are stored in ropedata.xml
Rope types 0, 15 and 18 have proper physics for hanging objects (taut, do not sag, small to medium diameter, good aspect for a rope)
lua:
-- 0xE832D760399EB220 · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local rotX = 0.0
local rotY = 0.0
local rotZ = 0.0
local length = 0.0
local ropeType = 0
local maxLength = 0.0
local minLength = 0.0
local p10 = 0.0
local p11 = true
local p12 = true
local rigid = true
local p14 = 0.0
local breakWhenShot = true
local p17 = true
local result, unkPtr = AddRope(x, y, z, rotX, rotY, rotZ, length, ropeType, maxLength, minLength, p10, p11, p12, rigid, p14, breakWhenShot, p17)

name: ATTACH_ENTITIES_TO_ROPE
comment:
Attaches entity 1 to entity 2.
If you use a boneName (p12/p13) make sure boneId (p15/p16) is set to -1.
lua:
-- 0x3D95EC8B6D940AC3 · build 1207
local ropeId = 0
local entity1 = 0
local entity2 = 0
local ent1X = 0.0
local ent1Y = 0.0
local ent1Z = 0.0
local ent2X = 0.0
local ent2Y = 0.0
local ent2Z = 0.0
local length = 0.0
local alwaysZero1 = 0
local alwaysZero2 = 0
local boneName1 = ""
local boneName2 = ""
local p14 = true
local boneId1 = 0
local boneId2 = 0
local alwaysZero3 = 0
local alwaysZero4 = 0
local p19 = true
local p20 = true
AttachEntitiesToRope(ropeId, entity1, entity2, ent1X, ent1Y, ent1Z, ent2X, ent2Y, ent2Z, length, alwaysZero1, alwaysZero2, boneName1, boneName2, p14, boneId1, boneId2, alwaysZero3, alwaysZero4, p19, p20)

name: _ATTACH_ENTITIES_TO_ROPE_2
comment: Attaches a rope to two entities: binds two bones from two entities; one entity can be an object, i.e. a suspension point, the other an NPC bone
lua:

local entity1 = 0
local entity2 = 0
local ent1X = 0.0
local ent1Y = 0.0
local ent1Z = 0.0
local ent2X = 0.0
local ent2Y = 0.0
local ent2Z = 0.0
local boneName1 = ""
local boneName2 = ""
AttachEntitiesToRope2(ropeId, entity1, entity2, ent1X, ent1Y, ent1Z, ent2X, ent2Y, ent2Z, boneName1, boneName2)

name: _BREAK_ROPE
comment: ropeTop returns top half of rope, ropeBottom returns bottom half of rope
lua:
-- 0x4CFA2B7FAE115ECB · build 1207
local offsetX = 0.0
local offsetY = 0.0
local offsetZ = 0.0
local p6 = 0
local ropeId, ropeTop, ropeBottom = BreakRope(offsetX, offsetY, offsetZ, p6)

name: _CREATE_ROPE_WINDING_ABILITY
comment:
Combining this with ADD_ROPE enables winding
p1: mostly empty (0)
ropeModelType: RB_L_Wrist02, RB_R_Wrist02, ropeAttach, noose01x_Rope_03, SKEL_Neck0, SKEL_L_FOOT, SKEL_Neck1, Root_s_meatbit_Chunck_Xlarge01x
_CREATE_*
lua:
-- 0x3C6490D940FF5D0B · build 1207
local ropeId = 0
local p1 = ""
local ropeModelType = ""
local length = 0.0
local p4 = true
CreateRopeWindingAbility(ropeId, p1, ropeModelType, length, p4)
